creator: loughry@uswest.net
text:
This is a new screen saver for FreeBSD.  It looks a bit like xlock -mode qix,
but with anti-aliased lines and better color.  It compiles cleanly on FreeBSD
3.4-STABLE and diffs are provided for FreeBSD 4.0-STABLE.  Tested on a 200 MHz
Pentium Pro and a 486/33.  Compressed tar file (uuencoded) included below.

How-To-Repeat: The attached tar file contains three files: lines_saver.c, Makefile, and diffs
to make a version that compiles under FreeBSD 4.0-STABLE.  To build the program
first create the directory /usr/src/sys/modules/syscons/lines and copy the
two files lines_saver.c and Makefile into the directory.  Enter the commands
make obj && make && make install
